case_title: MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. VS. NATALIE A. BELL ET AL

docket_entries.description: CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET (TRANSACTION ID # 66578648) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 66578648) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BELL, NATALIE A. DOES 1 TO 10 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-02-2021
DECLARATION RE: VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 66578648) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.
DECLARATION RE: CCP 1033; INTEREST; AND EVIDENCE CODE 1550 (TRANSACTION ID # 66919284) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BELL, NATALIE A. $4,201.90 PRINCIPAL, $258.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,460.85, SEE SCANNED DOC
